banner.label: DEMO
banner.text: You are exploring Jobbliggaren as a guest. The content is sample data. Join the waitlist to save job ads and follow up on your own applications.

welcome.title: Welcome to demo mode
welcome.description: You are exploring Jobbliggaren without signing in. All content is sample data, no real applications or CVs.
welcome.canDoHeading: Here is what you can do as a guest:
welcome.canDoBrowse: Browse the overview of applications and CVs
welcome.canDoPipeline: See how the pipeline view works
welcome.needsAccountHeading: Here is what requires an account:
welcome.needsAccountSearch: Search and save job ads from Platsbanken
welcome.needsAccountEdit: Create or edit CVs and applications

oversikt.title: Overview
oversikt.lede: This is how it looks when you follow your applications. Everything here is sample data.
oversikt.noticeDraftsText: You have {count} drafts that have not been submitted. Finish and send them to keep the pipeline active.
oversikt.noticeMatchText: There are {count} new job ads that match the profile, most of them within {segment}.

ansokningar.title: My applications
ansokningar.lede: {total} sample applications spread across all status stages.

cv.title: CV
cv.lede: Examples of CV variants. Once you have an account you can create your own, edit freely and upload a PDF.

jobb.heroLede: These are sample job ads. Once you have an account you can search and save real job ads from Platsbanken.
jobb.searchLabel: Search by one or more words
jobb.searchHint: Search is locked in demo mode. Log in or join the waitlist to search the whole corpus.

detail.aboutBody: This is a sample application in demo mode. Log in or join the waitlist to create, edit and follow up on your own applications with status changes, notes and follow-ups.
